recommendations.title: It's Such a Beautiful Day
recommendations.overview: Dark and troubling events force Bill to reckon with the meaning of his life.

recommendations.title: Everything Will Be OK
recommendations.overview: A series of dark and troubling events forces Bill to reckon with the meaning of his life… or lack thereof.

recommendations.title: World of Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: A little girl is taken on a mind-bending tour of her distant future.

recommendations.title: Rejected
recommendations.overview: A hilarious collection of animated television commercials that were rejected because of their creator's failing grip on sanity.

recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

recommendations.title: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: During the rise of fascism in Mussolini's Italy, a wooden boy brought magically to life struggles to live up to his father's expectations.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Snail
recommendations.overview: Forcibly separated from her twin brother when they are orphaned, a melancholic misfit learns how to find confidence within herself amid the clutter of misfortunes and everyday life.

recommendations.title: A Part of You
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to pick up the pieces of her shattered world in this emotional and bittersweet coming-of-age drama about those who are left behind.
